name: frontier-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server for the Frontier on-chain order-book + prediction-market venue. Exposes market/maker/taker/position/lens and delegation tools with read, quote, dry-run simulation, and execute paths.

FRONTIER_PRIVATE_KEY.description: 0x private key. Without it, write tools dry-run and return calldata only.

tools.name: frontier_book_config
tools.description: Read a book's tokens, spacing, current tick, fee config, hooks, permissions.

tools.name: frontier_lens_summary
tools.description: Lens summary: current tick, spacing, tokens, best ask/bid.

tools.name: frontier_lens_depth
tools.description: Aggregated bid/ask depth levels between two ticks.

tools.name: frontier_quote
tools.description: Quote a buy or sell before trading.

tools.name: frontier_market_find
tools.description: Look up existing books for a token pair.

tools.name: frontier_market_create
tools.description: Create a geometric market (validated, simulated, optional execute).

tools.name: frontier_maker_deposit
tools.description: Place an ask or bid (validated, simulated, optional execute).

tools.name: frontier_maker_claim
tools.description: Claim net proceeds for a position.

tools.name: frontier_maker_cancel
tools.description: Cancel a position; returns proceeds + principal/refund.

tools.name: frontier_taker_swap
tools.description: Router exact-input swap with quote + slippage.

tools.name: frontier_taker_sweep
tools.description: Advanced direct sweep with explicit limits.

tools.name: frontier_position_get
tools.description: Read a position and its live entitlements.

tools.name: frontier_delegation_grant
tools.description: Grant selector-scoped delegation with optional expiry.

tools.name: frontier_delegation_check
tools.description: Check whether an operator is authorized for a selector.
